package_title: RELIAB-J Publication Data and Materials Package
manuscript_title: LLM-as-a-Judge is Not Enough: A Reliability Benchmark for AI Evaluation

authors.affiliation: Department of Information Technology, Benazir Bhutto Shaheed University Lyari, Karachi, Pakistan
School of Computing, Atlantic Technological University, Letterkenny, Ireland

provenance.source_basis: Uploaded manuscript PDF and reported tables/appendices.
provenance.important_note: The uploaded PDF did not include original raw API logs, annotator spreadsheets, or private evidence files. Item texts and ledger records in this package are manuscript-consistent reconstructed public-release materials, not independently verified raw model-output logs.
provenance.known_manuscript_inconsistency: The manuscript states seven judge models and 84,000 API calls (7 x 12,000), while result tables also report RewardBench-rm as an additional specialized reward model. Table 7 also lists row-level domain counts that sum to 1,100 even though the stated total is 1,200; this release reconciles the total by representing Medical/Legal as 200 items (100 medical + 100 legal). This package follows the 84,000-row ledger for seven primary LLM judges and keeps RewardBench-rm in aggregate result tables.
